name: KMS Recordings
description: With over 16 years of experience, we creates promotional video content to help new and established music and graphic design artists reach a wider global audience and transform their careers. We encourage viewers to support our channel by liking, subscribing, and engaging in the comments.

name: Beaconwave Recordings
description: Launched in 2024 and powered by Aurora Music Vietnam, Beaconwave Recordings is an electronic music platform dedicated to connecting passionate fans with talented artists. It covers a wide range of dance music genres - including house, dubstep, and trance - helping listeners discover new sounds while providing producers and DJs with a platform to grow their careers.
